payload.answer: That request is too broad to save as durable memory. Please choose a narrower AI-related preference, fact, project detail, or topic to remember.
repair_options: Save a specific AI interest, e.g. “I’m interested in AI safety.”
Save a specific AI project, e.g. “I’m building an AI chatbot for customer support.”
Save a preference, e.g. “Prefer concise explanations about AI topics.”
Save a learning goal, e.g. “I want to learn about machine learning fundamentals.”
Do not save anything for now.
